title: Curious Cat
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: Louie is standing on the door frame to the old shed he was found in.

title: Carrier Prince(ss)
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: On our drive back from the farm, Louie is resting in his carrier. We are on our way to his first veterinary appointment.

title: Sleepy Kitty
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: After Louie's first vet appointment, he is taking his first nap in my bed. He has earmites from living in the barn.

title: Eyes Wide Open
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: Louie is playing on the floor with his new toys. His left eye is a little bit cloudy in this photo, the first sign of some things wrong with his health. His earmites are being treated with eardrops.

title: Upside Down Fun!
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: Louie's energy seems endless this first day. He plays well into the evening.

title: Friends?
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: Louie and my roommate's cat, Kit, were separated for a few days when he first came home. This was the first time the two sat next to each other without hissing. They are in my living room. His eye is still cloudy and now it is reflecting light unlike the other eye.

title: On The Counter
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: While sitting on the counter, I noticed his right inner eyelid was raising higher than the other.

title: Ultra Relaxed
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: In his relaxed state, both of Louie's inner eyelids are a bit raised, but one was higher than the other.

title: Uh Oh...
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: Later that day, his right inner eyelid became red and we went to the vet as soon as we could get in. He was treated with eyedrops and an eye cream for Hans Syndrome.

title: That's His Mousey
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: His inner eyelid went down a bit and his energy went back up. This is Louie's favorite toy, Mousey, which he is playing with on my bed.

title: Blue Collar Cat
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: Louie has his blue inflatable collar on after he was neutered.

title: Are You Looking At Me?
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: After Louie healed from his procedure, his eyelid also continued to heal. Here, he is in my living room.

title: Friends!
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: Louie and Kit have become close. Through all of his treatments, sicknesses, and medication, Kit has been by Louie's side. The two cats are cuddling on our living room couch and in my lap.

title: Heart (Crossed) Eyes
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: Louie lays on my bed while he continues to struggle with his inner eyelids being raised. He has started a new eyedrop to help.

title: Loving Life
creator: Backes, Olivia
description: This most recent photo of Louie shows that he still has some raised inner eyelid on his right eye. While he lays on my purple chair, he looks out into the distance and remininces on his good life.
